hero.p: Fortius Foundation strengthens people, organisations and institutions that need more structure, better allies and a long-term vision.

home.meta-title: Fortius Foundation — We serve those who have chosen to serve
home.meta-desc: Fortius Foundation strengthens people, organisations and institutions that understand leadership as service and aspire to leave a lasting legacy.
home.hero-p: Fortius Foundation strengthens people, organisations and institutions that need more structure, better allies and a long-term vision.
home.ayudas-title: We help those who want to give better and those who need to grow better.
home.ayudas-feature-title: We design grants with rigour, oversight and a long-term vision.
home.ayudas-feature-desc: We ensure aid reaches deserving projects, is managed effectively and helps build more resilient institutions.
home.ayudas-item-donantes-desc: We structure grants with a long-term vision, oversight and professional standards.
home.ayudas-item-beneficiarios-desc: We support projects that need order, professionalisation and greater institutional capacity.
home.ayudas-item-como-desc: We aim for every grant to arrive better, be managed better and leave a more lasting impact.
home.nosotros-title: A platform to strengthen serious causes, solid teams and lasting institutions.
home.nosotros-feature-title: We strengthen those who need structure, allies and rigour to serve better.
home.nosotros-feature-desc: We work with people, organisations and institutions that understand leadership as service and want to build something that lasts.
home.incubadora-title: Success stories and projects under incubation within the Fortius ecosystem.
home.incubadora-feature-title: We incubate initiatives with a vocation for impact and strengthen those already bearing fruit.
home.incubadora-feature-desc: We support projects before they become institutions and also when they need structure to consolidate.
home.programas-title: We develop the leaders the world needs — with rigour, discernment and a transatlantic vision.
home.programas-feature-desc: A training and connection programme for future European and American leaders, focused on the exchange of ideas and the strengthening of civil society on both sides of the Atlantic.

nosotros.meta-desc: Board, Advisory Council and team of Fortius Foundation (Spain and United States).
nosotros.h1: We empower those who understand leadership as service.
nosotros.intro-title: We work so that the right ideas transform society.
nosotros.intro-p1: Fortius Foundation strengthens people, organisations and institutions that need more structure, better allies and a long-term vision.
nosotros.intro-p2: Our work combines institutional rigour, strategic support and a genuine vocation of service.
nosotros.enfoque-title: Structure, rigour and a vocation for legacy.
nosotros.enfoque-p: We do not seek superficial visibility. We seek to reinforce serious causes so they endure, grow and serve better.
nosotros.recorrido-box-title: We support projects, people and institutions with an ambition to serve.
nosotros.recorrido-box-p: This journey allows us to assess better, connect better and serve better those who need more than occasional support.
nosotros.personas-h2: A team committed to strengthening noble causes with professionalism, rigour and excellence.
nosotros.personas-p1: Fortius Foundation brings together profiles with experience in management, strategy, analysis, law, communications, fundraising and institutional development.
nosotros.personas-p2: We share one conviction: good causes also need organisation, rigour and continuity.

incubadora.meta-desc: Projects under incubation and success stories within the Fortius Foundation ecosystem.
incubadora.h1: We incubate initiatives with a vocation for impact and support their consolidation.
incubadora.p: We work with projects that want to move from idea to institution. We provide structure, rigour, network and professional support.

transatlantic.meta-desc: A training and connection programme for future European and American leaders.
transatlantic.p: A training and connection programme for future European and American leaders, focused on the exchange of ideas and the strengthening of civil society on both sides of the Atlantic.

ayudas.meta-desc: How Fortius Foundation works with donors, grantees and growing projects.
ayudas.h1: We design grants with rigour, oversight and a vocation for impact.
ayudas.p: We work to ensure that financial or strategic support reaches its destination better, is executed more efficiently and truly strengthens the organisations serving valuable causes.
ayudas.donantes-title: We help donors give with greater rigour, better oversight and more institutional clarity.
ayudas.beneficiarios-title: We support projects and organisations that need structure, focus and capacity for growth.

blog.meta-desc: Articles, analysis and reflections from the Fortius Foundation team.
blog.h1: We think aloud about the causes that deserve more structure and more rigour.

contacto.meta-desc: Get in touch with the Fortius Foundation team.
contacto.h1: Do you have a project that deserves more structure and support?
contacto.p: Tell us what you are working on. The Fortius Foundation team will get back to you within 48 hours.
contacto.success-p: We will be in touch within 48 hours.
contacto.error-generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

donaciones.meta-desc: Support the mission of Fortius Foundation with your donation.
donaciones.h1: Support causes that deserve more structure, rigour and continuity.
donaciones.p: Your donation strengthens projects, develops leaders and builds institutions that serve the common good with excellence and a vocation for legacy.
donaciones.success-p: The Fortius Foundation team will contact you to complete the donation process.

registro.meta-desc: Create your account as a Fortius Foundation grantee.
registro.p: Create your account to view available grant calls and submit your application.
registro.login-link: Already have an account? Sign in
registro.success-p: Please check your email to verify your account.

newsletter.title: Follow our work. Discover our opportunities.
newsletter.p: What we think, what we do. What you won't find anywhere else. Once a month.
newsletter.error-fallback: We could not complete your subscription. Please try again.

marquee.title: Initiatives under incubation and consolidated projects in the Fortius ecosystem.
marquee.description: We turn a vocation for service into better-defined, sustainable projects capable of leaving a legacy.
